```jsonl
// File: history/fundamentals/INE849A01020/competitors.jsonl
{"schemaVersion":"1.0","version":1,"ts":"2026-06-14T04:38:23.582279447Z","hash":"9c93c79a7d502cd2f03c436669c0d5c5216131fa4dede33566fcf55705c7e890","data":[{"isin":"INE192R01011","symbol":"DMART","exchange":"BSE","sector":"Retailing","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE192R01011","company_name":"Avenue Supermarts Limited","company_profile":"Avenue Supermarts Limited is an India-based company, which is engaged in the business of organized retail and operating supermarkets under the DMart brand name. DMart is a supermarket chain that offers customers a range of products with a focus on the foods, non-foods fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) and general merchandise and apparel product categories. Its stores stock home utility products, including food, toiletries, beauty products, garments, kitchenware, bed and bath linen, home appliances and others. The Company offers its products under various categories, such as bed and bath, dairy and frozen, fruits and vegetables, crockery, toys and games, kids’ apparel, ladies’ garments, apparel for men, home and personal care, daily essentials, groceries, and staples. DMart operates approximately 424 stores and has a presence across Maharashtra, Gujarat, Andhra Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, Karnataka, Telangana, and Chhattisgarh.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":260373.13,"unit":"crore","formatted":"260,373.13 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":28.93,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$28.93B"}},{"isin":"INE01EA01019","symbol":"VMM","exchange":"BSE","sector":"Retailing","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE01EA01019","company_name":"Vishal Mega Mart Limited","company_profile":"Vishal Mega Mart Limited is an India-based company that curates a range of merchandize through its portfolio of own brands and third-party brands to fulfil daily needs of consumers. It offers products across three major product categories: apparel, general merchandise and fast-moving consumer goods. Its apparel category comprises exclusively of its own brands with a range of apparel for all members of a family. Its apparel category products include shirts, denim, formal wear, children, and infants. Its general merchandize and fast-moving consumer goods categories comprise its own brand and third-party brand products. Its general merchandize category products include home appliances, crockery and utensils, travel products and footwear. Its fast-moving consumer goods category products include packaged food, staples and non-food categories. It has a pan-India network of around 645 Vishal Mega Mart stores. It also sells its products through Vishal Mega Mart mobile application and Website.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":55976.21,"unit":"crore","formatted":"55,976.21 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":6.22,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$6.22B"}},{"isin":"INE14LE01019","symbol":"ABLBL","exchange":"BSE","sector":"DVR","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE14LE01019","company_name":"Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands ","company_profile":"Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands Ltd encompasses the lifestyle brands of Louis Philippe, Van Heusen, Allen Solly, Peter England and Simon Carter. Additionally, it has the youth-fashion western wear brands of American Eagle, an innerwear business under Van Heusen and the sportswear business of Reebok. The Company has retail space spanning over 4.7 million square feet across India. The Company has a network of 3,305 brand stores and a presence across 37,000 multi-brand outlets and 7000 shop-in-shop across department stores.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":11997.73,"unit":"crore","formatted":"11,997.73 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":1.33,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$1.33B"}},{"isin":"INE02RE01045","symbol":"FIRSTCRY","exchange":"BSE","sector":"DVR","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE02RE01045","company_name":"Brainbees Solutions Limited","company_profile":"Brainbees Solutions Limited provides multi-channel retailing platform for mothers’, babies’ and kids’ products, in terms of gross merchandise value. It sells mothers’, babies’ and kids’ products through its online platform, Company-owned modern stores, franchisee-owned modern stores and general trade retail distribution. Its segments include India multi-channel, International, Globalbees and Others. India multi-channel segment includes business of manufacturing, buying, selling, advertising, promoting baby and kids’ products in India. International segment includes the business of buying, selling, advertising, promoting baby and kids’ products outside India, which includes United Arab Emirates and Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Globalbees segment is a direct-to-consumer venture that aggregates and invests in e-commerce brands and helps the brands scale and transform their digital impression. The FirstCry platform is a multi-channel retail destination for mothers’, babies’ and kids’ products.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":11318.05,"unit":"crore","formatted":"11,318.05 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":1.26,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$1.26B"}},{"isin":"INE290S01011","symbol":"CARTRADE","exchange":"BSE","sector":"Automobiles","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE290S01011","company_name":"CarTrade Tech Limited","company_profile":"CarTrade Tech Limited is an India-based multi-channel auto platform with presence across vehicle types and value-added services. The Company offers a variety of solutions across the automotive transaction value chain, such as the buying, selling, marketing, valuation, and financing of new and used cars, two-wheelers, commercial vehicles, and farm and construction equipment. The Company operates through several platforms, such as CarWale, CarTrade, Shriram Automall, BikeWale, CarTrade Exchange, and Adroit Auto. Its platforms enable new and used automobile customers, vehicle dealerships, vehicle original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), and other businesses to buy and sell their vehicles. Its CarWale services include new car OEM solutions, new car dealer solutions, used car dealer solutions, and technology solutions for OEMs and dealers. The Company’s subsidiaries include CarTradeExchange Solutions Private Limited, CarTrade Finance Private Limited, and CarTrade Foundation.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":11280.85,"unit":"crore","formatted":"11,280.85 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":1.25,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$1.25B"}},{"isin":"INE804L01022","symbol":"MEDPLUS","exchange":"BSE","sector":"Pharmaceuticals","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE804L01022","company_name":"Medplus Health Services Limite","company_profile":"MedPlus Health Services Limited is an India-based company. The Company is primarily engaged in retail trading of medicines and general items, wholesale cash and carry and pathological laboratory testing services, wholesale trading and manufacturing of pharmaceutical products, fast-moving consumer goods and beauty products. It operates through three segments: Retail, Diagnostics, and Others. The Retail segment is engaged in trading of pharmaceuticals and general items through its retail stores and online platform. The Diagnostics segment includes diagnostic services, pathological services, and laboratory testing services. The Other segment includes insurance broking business. The Company operates approximately 4,712 stores. Its omni-channel platform enables the Company to service its customers through its stores, as well as its online channels. Its e-commerce portals include MedPlus Mart, MedPlus Lens, and MedPlus Labs.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":10589.42,"unit":"crore","formatted":"10,589.42 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":1.18,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$1.18B"}},{"isin":"INE945H01021","symbol":"V2RETAIL","exchange":"BSE","sector":"DVR","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE945H01021","company_name":"V2 RETAIL LTD.","company_profile":"V2 Retail Limited is an India-based retail chain company. The Company is engaged in the business of retail trade of garments, textiles and accessories. The Company offers a portfolio of products, including apparel and lifestyle products. It is focused on northern and eastern India. It caters to the neo-middle class group of population living in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. Its product portfolio mix includes men's wear, such as upper, lower, occasion wear, winter wear, sportswear, formal and casual; ladies wear, such as ethnic wear, upper, lower, occasion wear, winter wear and sportswear; kids wear, such as boy, girls, infants and winter wear, and lifestyle, such as deodorants, wallets, sunglasses and ladies purse, among others. It has a presence in 17 states of India with 130 fashionable operational stores. Its brands include ebellia, Glamora, GODSPEED, HERRLICH and Honey Brats. Its subsidiary V2 Smart Manufacturing Private Limited is engaged in the manufacturing of apparels.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":8164.23,"unit":"crore","formatted":"8,164.23 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":907.14,"unit":"million","formatted":"$907.14M"}},{"isin":"INE0LXT01019","symbol":"REDTAPE","exchange":"BSE","sector":"Retailing","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE0LXT01019","company_name":"REDTAPE Limited","company_profile":"RedTape Limited is an India-based company, which operates as a fashion and lifestyle brand. The Company is engaged in the business of retailing, marketing, design and development of sports and fashion footwear, garments, apparel and other accessories. The Company offers a diversified product line from footwear to a mix of casual and semi-formal apparel, including shirts, T-shirts, ethnic wear, trousers, denims, sweaters, jackets, belts, socks, wallets, and handkerchiefs. It owns a portfolio of brands, namely RedTape, RedTape Ozark, MODE by RedTape, and Bond Street by RedTape. The Ozark brand is crafted for mountain trails, hiking, trekking and trail runs. The Company operates in approximately 17 countries, including India, the United Kingdom, the United States, Australia, Turkiye, United Arab Emirates (UAE), France, Germany, West Asia and South Africa, and others.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":7404.86,"unit":"crore","formatted":"7,404.86 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":822.76,"unit":"million","formatted":"$822.76M"}},{"isin":"INE647O01011","symbol":"ABFRL","exchange":"BSE","sector":"Retailing","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE647O01011","company_name":"Aditya Birla Fashion and Retai","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":7318.18,"unit":"crore","formatted":"7,318.18 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":813.13,"unit":"million","formatted":"$813.13M"}},{"isin":"INE679V01027","symbol":"AVL","exchange":"BSE","sector":"Retailing","instrument_key":"BSE_EQ|INE679V01027","company_name":"Aditya Vision Limited","company_profile":"Aditya Vision Limited is an India-based multi-brand consumer electronics retail chain. The Company offers more than 10,000 products from multinational and domestic brands, which include digital gadgets, entertainment solutions, home appliances, small appliances, kitchen appliances, and personal care products. Its product categories include television, cooler, induction cooktop, tablet, wireless stereo, smartwatch, printer, refrigerator, cable, dishwasher, geyser, and personal computer. It retails for various brands, such as Samsung, LG, Sony, Godrej, Whirlpool, Haier, Lenovo, among others. Its services include Aditya Seva, Aditya Suraksha, and express delivery. The Company provides after-sales customer service through dedicated customer service engagements and a helpline called Aditya Seva. Aditya Seva is a one-stop solution for all product-related grievances of customers. It provides an extended warranty service through Aditya Suraksha. It operates approximately 148 retail showrooms.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":6962.48,"unit":"crore","formatted":"6,962.48 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":773.61,"unit":"million","formatted":"$773.61M"}}]}
```

```jsonl
// File: history/fundamentals/INE849A01020/profile.jsonl
{"schemaVersion":"1.0","version":1,"ts":"2026-06-14T04:38:23.516918293Z","hash":"b450ed16816d9da406b7f51fe091be4cee584caa8c1de4644507a397418b6d0b","data":{"fetchedTs":null,"sector":"Retailing","company_profile":"Trent Limited is part of the Tata Group and operates a portfolio of retail concepts. Its brands are divided into two groups, namely Fashion and Lifestyle and Food and Grocery. The Company’s primary customer propositions include Westside, which operates a chain of fashion retail stores that offers a broad range of products ranging from apparel, footwear, accessories to cosmetics and perfumes to home accessories and gift offers, among others; Zudio, which offers several product categories, including apparel for men, women and kids, footwear and others; and Trent Hypermarket, which operates in the food, grocery and daily needs segment under the Star banner. It operates cash and carry stores under the Booker Wholesale banner that focuses on categories and assortments relevant to small businesses, which include products in categories including staples, processed foods, confectionery, personal care, home care, among others. Its other brands include Utsa and SAMOH.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":146892.17,"unit":"crore","formatted":"146,892.17 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":16.32,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$16.32B"}}}
```

```jsonl
// File: history/fundamentals/INE931S01010/competitors.jsonl
{"schemaVersion":"1.0","version":1,"ts":"2026-06-14T04:38:29.112855755Z","hash":"2a6744e91ba448dd2a45adc0b5c5506abf572503fb3fd26e38c26c478d59b537","data":[{"isin":"INE814H01029","symbol":"ADANIPOWER","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power Generation & Distribution","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE814H01029","company_name":"ADANI POWER LTD","company_profile":"Adani Power Limited is an India-based private base load power generation company. The Company has an installed thermal power capacity of approximately 18,150 megawatts (MW) spread over 13 power plants and a 40 MW solar power plant in Gujarat. Its segments include Power Generation and related activities and Trading, Investment and other activities. It sells power generated from its projects under a combination of long-term power purchase agreements (PPAs), supplemental power purchase agreements (SPPAs), medium-term PPA, short-term PPA, and on a merchant basis. Its power plants are located in various locations, including Mundra, Gujarat; Tiroda and Butibori, Maharashtra; Kawai, Rajasthan; Udupi, Karnataka; Raipur, Chhattisgarh; Raigarh, Chhattisgarh; Godda, Jharkhand; Singrauli, Madhya Pradesh (ongoing expansion); Singrauli, Madhya Pradesh, and Bitta, Gujarat. Its Udupi power plant operates as an imported coal-based utility with a capacity of approximately 1.2 gigawatts (GW).","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":429855.84,"unit":"crore","formatted":"429,855.84 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":47.76,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$47.76B"}},{"isin":"INE733E01010","symbol":"NTPC","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE733E01010","company_name":"NTPC LTD","company_profile":"NTPC Limited is an India-based power generating company. The Company is involved in the generation and sale of bulk power to State Power Utilities. Its segments include Generation of energy and Others. Its generation of energy segment is engaged in generation and sale of bulk power to state power utilities. Its other segment is focused on providing consultancy, project management and supervision, energy trading, oil and gas exploration, and coal mining. The Company operates power stations across various Indian states, either independently or through its joint ventures (JVs) and subsidiaries. Its subsidiaries include NTPC Vidyut Vyapar Nigam Limited, NTPC Electric Supply Company Limited, Bhartiya Rail Bijlee Company Limited, Patratu Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited, NTPC Mining Limited, North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited, THDC India Limited, NTPC EDMC Waste Solutions Private Limited, NTPC Green Energy Limited, and Ratnagiri Gas and Power Private Limited.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":343213.5,"unit":"crore","formatted":"343,213.50 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":38.13,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$38.13B"}},{"isin":"INE752E01010","symbol":"POWERGRID","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE752E01010","company_name":"POWER GRID CORP. LTD.","company_profile":"Power Grid Corporation of India Limited is an electric power transmission utility company. The Company is primarily engaged in the implementation, operation and maintenance of Inter-State Transmission System (ISTS), telecom and consultancy services as its business segments. The transmission business involves operating and maintaining its transmission assets to power supply for customers. It operates the telecom business through its wholly owned subsidiary, namely, POWERGRID Teleservices Limited under the brand name PowerTel. It provides consultancy solutions in the transmission, distribution and telecom sectors, including system studies, design, engineering, load dispatch, optical ground wire (OPGW) on intra-state transmission network, procurement management, operational & maintenance and project management. Alongside, it provides consultancy for implementation of intra-state transmission network and smart grid projects, energy efficiency & energy audit, capacity building assignments.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":264881.2,"unit":"crore","formatted":"264,881.20 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":29.43,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$29.43B"}},{"isin":"INE364U01010","symbol":"ADANIGREEN","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE364U01010","company_name":"ADANI GREEN ENERGY LTD","company_profile":"Adani Green Energy Limited is an India-based renewable energy company. The Company has a presence across 12 states of India, focusing on solar, wind and hybrid (solar wind) renewable power generation. It operates through two segments: renewable power generation and other related ancillary activities and sale of solar power equipments. The sale of solar power equipments segment comprises of an associate, Mundra Solar Energy Limited. The Company sells renewable power generated from its projects under a combination of long-term power purchase agreements (PPA) and on merchant basis and other ancillary activities. It is also developing solar park at khavda, Gujarat over 19,000 hectares and subleased 6,129 hectares land to its subsidiaries including step down subsidiaries and other related parties. Its locked-in renewable energy portfolio stands at approximately 21,953 megawatt (MW) (10,934 MW operational and 11,019 MW under execution) and another 500 MW of hydro pumped storage project.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":244622.13,"unit":"crore","formatted":"244,622.13 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":27.18,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$27.18B"}},{"isin":"INE1NPP01017","symbol":"ENRIN","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power Generation & Distribution","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE1NPP01017","company_name":"SIEMENS ENERGY INDIA LTD","company_profile":"Siemens Energy India Ltd is engaged in infrastructure and transport as well as transmission and generation of electrical power. The Company offers a range of products, solutions and services covering a large part of the energy value chain. Its customer base includes oil and gas, power utilities, IPPs, EPCs, transmission system operators, data centers and industrial companies in sectors such as cement, metals, sugar and ethanol, paper & pulp, and petrochemicals. The Company’s segments include Power Generation and Power Transmission. The Generation Segment focuses on business and related services, such as large and industrial gas turbines, large and industrial steam turbines, energy efficiency solutions such as waste heat recovery, and others. The Transmission segment focuses on manufacturing and supplying HV and EHV equipment like air insulated (AIS) and gas insulated (GIS) switchgears, power transformers, bushing, instrument transformers and coils and related accessories.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":128605.8,"unit":"crore","formatted":"128,605.80 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":14.29,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$14.29B"}},{"isin":"INE245A01021","symbol":"TATAPOWER","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE245A01021","company_name":"TATA POWER CO LTD","company_profile":"The Tata Power Company Limited is an India-based integrated power company. The principal business of the Company is generation, transmission and distribution of electricity. Its segments include Thermal & Hydro, Renewables, Transmission and Distribution, and Others. Its Thermal & Hydro segment comprises of generation of power from hydroelectric sources and thermal sources (coal, gas and oil) from plants owned and operated under lease arrangement and related ancillary services. Its Renewables segment comprises of generation of power from renewable energy sources, such as wind and solar. Its Transmission and Distribution comprises of transmission and distribution network, sale of power to retail customers through distribution network and related ancillary services. Its Others segment comprises of project management contracts/infrastructure management services, property under development and satellite communication. ","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":125768.56,"unit":"crore","formatted":"125,768.56 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":13.97,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$13.97B"}},{"isin":"INE121E01018","symbol":"JSWENERGY","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE121E01018","company_name":"JSW ENERGY LIMITED","company_profile":"JSW Energy Limited is an India-based power company, which is engaged in the business of power generation. The Company operates through two segments: Thermal and Renewables. Its Thermal segment comprises generation of power from coal and other thermal sources (lignite, gas, and oil) from plants owned and related ancillary services. Its Renewables segment comprises generation of power from renewable energy sources through hydro, wind, solar, and related ancillary services. Its plants include Baspa, Karcham Wangtoo, Barmer, Vijaynagar and Ratnagiri. Baspa Plant is in the higher reaches of the Himalayas and has a generating capacity of approximately 300 megawatts (MW). The Karcham Wangtoo plant is located on the river Satluj in Kinnaur District of Himachal Pradesh and has a generating capacity of approximately 1091 MW. Barmer Plant is located close to its fuel source, the lignite mines in Kapurdi, and Jalipa. The Vijayanagar plant consists of two separate business units, BU I and SBU I.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":102601.69,"unit":"crore","formatted":"102,601.69 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":11.4,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$11.40B"}},{"isin":"INE0ONG01011","symbol":"NTPCGREEN","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE0ONG01011","company_name":"NTPC GREEN ENERGY LIMITED","company_profile":"NTPC Green Energy Limited is an India-based green energy solutions company. The Company operates in one segment, which is the generation of electricity. The Company’s green portfolio includes solar power, wind power, floating solar power, energy storage, hybrid power, and green hydrogen. It is involved in the development of onshore and offshore wind power projects across diverse regions. Its floating solar power portfolio offers a sustainable and space-efficient solution through the installation of solar photovoltaic. Its solar projects include Rajgarh, Anantpur, Bhadla, Mandsaur, Devikot-2, Shimbhoo Ka Burj-1, Fatehgarh, Shimbhoo Ka Burj-2, Ettayapuram, Ayodhya and others. Its wind projects include Rojmal, Dayapar-I, Lakkundi, and Amreli. Its Dayapar-I project has approximately 146 megawatts (MWs) of capacity. Its Lakkundi project has approximately 300 MW capacity. The Company’s subsidiaries include NTPC Renewable Energy Limited and Green Valley Renewable Energy Limited.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":82915.08,"unit":"crore","formatted":"82,915.08 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":9.21,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$9.21B"}},{"isin":"INE848E01016","symbol":"NHPC","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE848E01016","company_name":"NHPC LTD","company_profile":"NHPC Limited is an India-based company, which is primarily engaged in the generation and sale of bulk power to various power utilities. The Company’s other business activities include project management / construction contracts/ consultancy assignment services and trading of power. It has an installed capacity of approximately 8247.18 megawatts (MW), including 1681.70 MW in joint venture, comprising over 7771.20 MW from 23 hydro power stations, 425.98 MW from five solar power projects and 50 MW from a wind power project. Its power stations include Salal, Dulhasti, Chutak, Baira Siul, Tanakpur, Dhauliganga, Rangit, Loktak, Indira Saga, Chamera-I, Uri-I, Omkareshwa, and others. Its consultancy services offer survey and investigation, planning, design and engineering, construction, operation and maintenance, renovation, modernization and updating of hydropower projects. Its subsidiaries include NHDC Limited, Bundelkhand Saur Urja Limited, Lanco Teesta Hydro Power Limited, and others.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":74102.22,"unit":"crore","formatted":"74,102.22 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":8.23,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$8.23B"}},{"isin":"INE813H01021","symbol":"TORNTPOWER","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Power","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE813H01021","company_name":"TORRENT POWER LTD","company_profile":"Torrent Power Limited is an India-based integrated power utility company. The Company has a presence in power generation, transmission, distribution and manufacturing and supply of power cables. The Company operates through three segments: Generation, Transmission and Distribution, and Renewables. The Generation segment comprises of generation of power from thermal sources (gas and coal) and trading of regassified liquified natural gas. The Transmission and Distribution segment comprises of transmission and distribution business (licensed and franchisee) and related ancillary services. This segment also comprises the power cable business. The Renewables segment comprises of generation of power from renewable energy sources, such as wind and solar. The Company has an aggregate installed generation capacity of approximately 4,328-Megawatt peak (MWp) comprising of 2,730 megawatts (MW) of gas-based capacity, 1,236 MWp of renewable capacity and 362 MW of coal-based capacity.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":70171.09,"unit":"crore","formatted":"70,171.09 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":7.8,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$7.80B"}}]}
```

```jsonl
// File: history/fundamentals/INE931S01010/profile.jsonl
{"schemaVersion":"1.0","version":1,"ts":"2026-06-14T04:38:28.981484370Z","hash":"73426db6dc631c5703ed34118b1aa945e5753451e263d468439ec866dce52955","data":{"fetchedTs":null,"sector":"Power","company_profile":"Adani Energy Solutions Limited is an India-based holding company. The Company is a private utility providing end-to-end energy solutions. Its segments include Transmission, GTD Business, Smart Metering, and Trading. The Transmission segment is engaged in providing transmission lines for transmission of power. The GTD Business segment is engaged in the generation, transmission, and distribution (GTD) of power business for Mumbai city (Mumbai GTD Business) and Mundra distribution. The Smart Metering segment focuses on supply, installing and maintaining of a Smart Metering Project on a Design-Build-Finance-Own-Operate-Transfer (DBFOOT) basis. The Trading segment is involved in trading activity of goods. It owns and operates various high voltage AC transmission lines and substations. It also offers cooling solutions and others. The Company has approximately 21,783 circuit kilometers (ckm) of transmission lines and 61,686 mega volt amp (MVA) of transformation capacity.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":178654.75,"unit":"crore","formatted":"178,654.75 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":19.85,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$19.85B"}}}
```

```jsonl
// File: history/fundamentals/INE974X01010/competitors.jsonl
{"schemaVersion":"1.0","version":1,"ts":"2026-06-14T04:38:26.214038832Z","hash":"22c48e8e6bec958e2250e2199ddcbc45f3d720078b806a7e3b6344cc9d8948fa","data":[{"isin":"INE298A01020","symbol":"CUMMINSIND","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Diesel Engines","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE298A01020","company_name":"CUMMINS INDIA LTD","company_profile":"Cummins India Limited is a manufacturer of diesel and natural gas engines for power generation, industrial and automotive markets. The Company’s business units include engines, power systems, and distribution. Its engine business manufactures engines from 125 to 400 horsepower (HP) for low, medium and heavy-duty on-highway commercial vehicle markets and off-highway commercial equipment industries spanning construction and compressor (49HP to 430HP). Its power systems business designs and manufactures robust engines with a horsepower spectrum ranging from 700 HP to 4500 HP. These engines are tailored for various sectors, including marine, railways, defense, and mining. Its distribution business provides products, packages, services and solutions for the uptime of its equipment. Its digital products include Acumen, Incal and Inline. It serves end users, Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs), channel partners, dealers, distributors, and retailers.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":155861.24,"unit":"crore","formatted":"155,861.24 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":17.32,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$17.32B"}},{"isin":"INE702C01027","symbol":"APLAPOLLO","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Steel & Iron Products","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE702C01027","company_name":"APL APOLLO TUBES LTD","company_profile":"APL Apollo Tubes Limited is a producer of structural steel tubes in India. It is engaged in the business of producing electric resistance welded (ERW) steel tubes. Its multi-product offerings include over 3000 varieties of pre-galvanized tubes, structural steel tubes, galvanized tubes, MS black pipes, and hollow sections. Its product category includes Apollo Structural, Apollo Z, and Apollo Galv. Its products include Fencing Tube, Window Frame Tube (L), Handrill, Apollo Signature, and Double Door Frame. It offers products under various brands, which include Apollo Fabritech, Apollo Build, Apollo DFT, Apollo Column, Apollo Bheem, Apollo Green, Apollo Standard, Apollo Agri, Apollo D Section, Apollo Narrow, and Apollo Ready Chaukhat, among others. Its products are used in various applications, which include agricultural and plumbing, firefighting, staircase steps, warehousing factory sheds, balcony grills, sheds, greenhouse structures, plumbing and lighting poles, among others.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":50478.3,"unit":"crore","formatted":"50,478.30 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":5.61,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$5.61B"}},{"isin":"INE191B01025","symbol":"WELCORP","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Steel & Iron Products","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE191B01025","company_name":"WELSPUN CORP LIMITED","company_profile":"Welspun Corp Limited is an India-based company, which is engaged in the line pipes and home solutions, along with other lines of businesses in infrastructure, pipe solutions, building materials, warehousing, retail, advanced textiles and flooring solutions. The Company is engaged in the manufacturing of large diameter pipes globally and has established a global footprint across six continents and fifty countries by delivering key customized solutions for both onshore and offshore applications. It offers end-to-end products, comprehensive pipe solutions and ancillary services. It also manufactures Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) -certified steel billets, thermo-mechanically treated (TMT) rebars, ductile iron (DI) pipes, stainless steel pipes, and tubes & bars. The Company has manufacturing facilities in Anjar (Gujarat), Bhopal (Madhya Pradesh), Mandya (Karnataka) and Jhagadia (Gujarat) in India. Overseas, the Company has a manufacturing presence in Little Rock, Arkansas, United States.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":36902.99,"unit":"crore","formatted":"36,902.99 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":4.1,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$4.10B"}},{"isin":"INE146L01010","symbol":"KIRLOSENG","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Engineering","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE146L01010","company_name":"KIRLOSKAR OIL ENG LTD","company_profile":"Kirloskar Oil Engines Limited is an India-based company, which is engaged in the business of manufacturing of engines, generating sets, pump sets and power tillers and spares thereof. The Company operates through three segments: Business to Business (B2B), Business to Customer (B2C), and Financial Services. Its B2B segment includes businesses related to fuel agnostic internal combustion engine platforms. The businesses include power generation, industrial, and distribution & aftermarket and international business. Its power generation business includes engines, gensets, and backup solutions, across a range of power output from 2.1 kilovolt amperes (kVA) to 5200 kVA. The industrial engine business manufactures a variety of diesel engines and offers from 20 horsepower (hp) to 750 hp in the industrial engine. Its B2C segment consists of water management solutions and farm mechanization solutions such as pumps and pump-sets to induction motors, small engines, column pipes and cable.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":27453.55,"unit":"crore","formatted":"27,453.55 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":3.05,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$3.05B"}},{"isin":"INE536A01023","symbol":"GRINDWELL","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Abrasives","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE536A01023","company_name":"GRINDWELL NORTON LIMITED","company_profile":"Grindwell Norton Limited is an India-based company, which is engaged in the manufacturing of abrasives, performance plastics and refractory products. The Company's segments include abrasives, ceramics and plastics, digital services, and others. The abrasives segment markets and manufactures a full range of bonded abrasives, coated abrasives (including non-woven abrasives), thin wheels and super abrasives. Its performance ceramics and refractories business makes ceramic and refractory products for a wide range of industrial applications. The products manufactured include silicon carbide based shaped refractory and ceramic products. Its performance plastics business produces and markets more than 800 standard and custom-made polymer products through three business divisions: engineered components, life sciences and composites. It provides various digital services, such as application development, infrastructure management, and cybersecurity to the Saint-Gobain group globally.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":21279.83,"unit":"crore","formatted":"21,279.83 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":2.36,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$2.36B"}},{"isin":"INE120A01034","symbol":"CARBORUNIV","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Abrasives","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE120A01034","company_name":"CARBORUNDUM UNIVERSAL LTD","company_profile":"Carborundum Universal Limited is an India-based company, which manufactures and sells mainly abrasives, ceramics (industrial ceramics, refractories) and electro minerals. The Company's segments include Abrasives, Ceramics, Electrominerals, Power, IT Services and Others. Abrasive segment comprises of bonded, coated, processed cloth, polymers, power tools and coolants. Ceramics segment includes technical ceramics and super refractory solutions to address wear protection, corrosion resistance, electrical resistance, heat protection and ballistic protection. Electrominerals segment includes deals with the materials - fused aluminas, its variants, and silicon carbide - used in abrasives and refractories globally. The Company also provides information technology (IT) services, including IT infrastructure facility management services, software application development services and others. It has a manufacturing facility for phase change materials and specialty polymeric additives.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":20085.63,"unit":"crore","formatted":"20,085.63 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":2.23,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$2.23B"}},{"isin":"INE285A01027","symbol":"ELGIEQUIP","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Compressors","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE285A01027","company_name":"ELGI EQUIPMENTS LTD","company_profile":"Elgi Equipments Limited is an India-based company, which is engaged in manufacture, trading of air compressors and automotive garage equipment and also providing related after sales services. It provides a range of compressors, which includes rotary screw air compressors, oil lubricated air compressors, oil free air compressors, reciprocating air compressors, portable air compressors, and compressed air accessories. Its air compressor accessories include AF Series Compressed Air Filters, Air Alert 24/7 Monitoring, AR Premium Series Cyclic Refrigeration Dryers, Eos Oil Water Separator, EZL Series Zero Loss Drain Valves, and Heat Recovery System (HRS). Its oil free rotary screw air compressors include two-stage air cooled and water-cooled air compressor 45-450kw, and water injected screw compressor 11-110kw.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":19146.06,"unit":"crore","formatted":"19,146.06 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":2.13,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$2.13B"}},{"isin":"INE703B01027","symbol":"RATNAMANI","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Steel & Iron Products","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE703B01027","company_name":"RATNAMANI MET & TUB LTD.","company_profile":"Ratnamani Metals and Tubes Limited is an India-based holding company. The Company is engaged in the manufacturing of iron and steel tubes, tube fittings and pipes, including stainless steel seamless and welded tubes and pipes, nickel alloy seamless tubes, carbon steel welded pipes, alloy steel welded pipes, titanium welded tubes, and induction bend. Its segments include Steel Tubes and Pipes, Bearing Rings, and Pipe Spools and Auxiliary Support Systems. The Company provides critical tubing and piping solutions to a diverse range of industries and niche markets in core sectors, such as oil and gas, refinery and petrochemical, dairy, chemical and fertilizer, thermal, solar and nuclear power, liquefied natural gas (LNG), desalination, defense, aerospace, chillers and cooling system, pulp and paper industry, automobile, and others. The Company’s manufacturing facilities are located at Kutch, Indrad and Chhatral in the state of Gujarat, India.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":18093.55,"unit":"crore","formatted":"18,093.55 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":2.01,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$2.01B"}},{"isin":"INE980O01024","symbol":"JYOTICNC","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Engineering","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE980O01024","company_name":"JYOTI CNC AUTOMATION LTD","company_profile":"Jyoti CNC Automation Limited is an India-based company, which is engaged in the manufacturing and selling of metal-cutting computer numerical control (CNC) machines. The Company is a manufacturer of simultaneous 5-Axis CNC machines in India and supplies a diverse portfolio of CNC machines, including CNC Turning Centers, CNC Turn Mill Centers, CNC Vertical Machining Centers (VMCs) and CNC Horizontal Machining Centers (HMCs). It offers solutions suited for transitioning towards Industry (i) 4.0, including its flagship multifunctional solutions package, such as 7th Sense. 7th Sense is an i4.0 solution that performs mundane and repeat tasks independently, allowing humans to focus on the outcomes of these operations. 7th Sense gives a quick overview of current tasks, completion stages, and other insights. It serves various industries, including aerospace and defense, auto and auto components, general engineering, dies and molds, and others.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":15431.79,"unit":"crore","formatted":"15,431.79 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":1.71,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$1.71B"}},{"isin":"INE324A01032","symbol":"JINDALSAW","exchange":"NSE","sector":"Steel & Iron Products","instrument_key":"NSE_EQ|INE324A01032","company_name":"JINDAL SAW LIMITED","company_profile":"Jindal Saw Limited is an India-based company, which is a manufacturer and supplier of iron and steel pipes and pellets. The Company has one primary business segment, namely, Iron & Steel products. The Company manufactures submerged arc welded (SAW) pipes and spiral pipes for the energy transportation sector; carbon, alloy and seamless pipes and tubes for industrial applications; DI pipes and fittings for water and wastewater transportation. It serves a range of customers, including oil and gas exploration, transportation, power generation, supply of water for drinking, drainage, irrigation purposes, and others. The Company has manufacturing facilities in India, the United States of America (USA), Europe, and United Arab Emirates (UAE). It has a pellet plant in Bhilwara, Rajasthan. The Company's subsidiaries include Jindal Saw Holdings FZE, Jindal SAW Gulf LLC, and others.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":15239.48,"unit":"crore","formatted":"15,239.48 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":1.69,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$1.69B"}}]}
```

```jsonl
// File: history/fundamentals/INE974X01010/profile.jsonl
{"schemaVersion":"1.0","version":1,"ts":"2026-06-14T04:38:26.091038524Z","hash":"c41bcbe778d684a01bde1f4f7890b14d5b69eafd601603936101976df2979df5","data":{"fetchedTs":null,"sector":"Auto Ancillary","company_profile":"Tube Investments of India Limited is an India-based engineering company. Its divisions include Mobility, Engineering, Metal-Formed Products, and Others. The Mobility division comprises standard bi-cycles, special bi-cycles, such as alloy bikes and specialty performance bikes, fitness equipment and three-wheeler electric vehicles. The Engineering division comprises cold rolled steel strips and precision steel tubes, such as cold drawn welded tubes and electric resistant welded (ERW) tubes. The Metal Formed Products division comprises automotive chains, fine blanked products, stamped products, roll-formed car door frames and cold rolled formed sections for railway wagons and passenger coaches. The other product division includes TIDC industrial chains, TI Macho TMT Bars, and TI Optoelectronic Solutions. Its products include Engineering Class Chains, cowl cross beam, cam chain, and others. Its subsidiaries are Shanthi Gears Ltd and CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd.","sector_market_cap_inr":{"value":60769.85,"unit":"crore","formatted":"60,769.85 Cr"},"sector_market_cap_usd":{"value":6.75,"unit":"billion","formatted":"$6.75B"}}}
```
